meaning: adj.不隐瞒的,公然的,厚颜无耻的,不戴面具的
examples: Barefaced? No no, this really is my hairy face -look!
So Rob is a 'barefaced liar' because he's obviously telling a lie without any embarrassment.
Maybe it's the influence of designer Phoebe Philo, who almost always appears barefaced.
Similarly, Ms. Danes, who is practically barefaced as she peers deep into the camera's lens, promotes a natural beauty that has been rarely seen before at such close range on our TV screens.
